summary: AI Venue Card Draft Feature - Complete E2E Testing. All 9 test scenarios passed. Backend API tests (8/8 passed) and Frontend UI tests (all elements verified). The AI draft endpoint correctly generates premium venue card drafts using GPT-4o-mini via emergentintegrations LlmChat.

issues: Minor: Console warnings about span inside option/select elements (hydration warning) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/acquisitions/{acq_id}/ai-draft works for admin role (200 OK)
VERIFIED: POST /api/acquisitions/{acq_id}/ai-draft returns 403 for customer role

VERIFIED: AI draft response contains all 13 required fields: premium_title, tagline, highlights, description, suggested_tags, capacity_summary, pricing_summary, suitability, amenities_summary, missing_inputs, contradictions, readiness, readiness_note
VERIFIED: AI draft is cached on document (ai_venue_card_draft field persists in GET /acquisitions/{acq_id})
VERIFIED: Frontend DataTeamEditor shows AI Venue Card Draft section with data-testid='ai-draft-section'
VERIFIED: Frontend renders all AI draft sections: title, tagline, description, highlights, capacity, pricing, suitability, tags, amenities, missing inputs, readiness
VERIFIED: 'Apply as Summary' button copies description to publishable_summary field
VERIFIED: 'Regenerate Draft' button works to refresh the draft with new timestamp
VERIFIED: Sparse acquisition shows missing_inputs in amber warning box (13 items flagged)
VERIFIED: Sparse acquisition shows readiness as 'needs_major_inputs' with 'Major Inputs Needed' badge
seed_data_creation: Used existing test acquisitions: acq_c02044f87f88 (full data), acq_6532e309d32a (sparse data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Venue Card Draft feature fully tested. The endpoint uses emergentintegrations LlmChat with GPT-4o-mini (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env). Two test acquisitions exist with cached AI drafts. Frontend DataTeamEditor at /team/field/refine/{acqId} has all data-testid attributes for testing. AI generation takes 3-5 seconds.
